tests.description: An empty kind falls back to the generic 'Action' label.
tests.key: actionKindLabel › falls back to Action for an empty kind

tests.description: Known action kinds map to their human labels.
tests.key: actionKindLabel › maps known kinds

tests.description: An unknown kind is title-cased as a fallback.
tests.key: actionKindLabel › title-cases an unknown kind

tests.description: Returns null when nothing is active.
tests.key: activeCoach › returns null when no coach is active

tests.description: Returns the view whose row is the active coach.
tests.key: activeCoach › returns the active coach when one is set

tests.description: a bare date is placed at 07:00 so it sorts among morning entries
tests.key: briefingOccurredAt › appends a morning time to a bare date

tests.description: a full ISO datetime is passed through unchanged
tests.key: briefingOccurredAt › leaves a full datetime untouched

tests.description: The area path is the line path closed back down to the baseline.
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › closes the area path back to the baseline

tests.description: Larger values render higher on the canvas (a smaller y, since y is inverted).
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › draws higher values higher on the canvas, smaller y

tests.description: Every y coordinate stays inside the padded box (peaks never clip).
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › keeps all y coordinates inside the padded box

tests.description: A single value plots at the horizontal centre of the box.
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › places a single point at the horizontal centre

tests.description: A flat series plots on the vertical centre without dividing by zero.
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › plots a flat series on the vertical centre without dividing by zero

tests.description: No values yields an empty geometry with no NaN coordinates.
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › returns an empty geometry for no values, no NaN coords

tests.description: Multiple points spread evenly across the inner (padded) width.
tests.key: buildChartGeometry › spreads points evenly across the inner width

tests.description: entries across days land in newest-first day groups
tests.key: buildTimeline › groups entries into newest-first days

tests.description: each source kind is normalized with a composite id, filterKey, and summary
tests.key: buildTimeline › normalizes all four source kinds into grouped entries

tests.description: no rows yields no days (the production day-one state)
tests.key: buildTimeline › returns an empty array for empty sources

tests.description: a workout without occurredAt cannot be placed on the timeline and is skipped
tests.key: buildTimeline › skips workouts that have no occurredAt

tests.description: honors a custom radius argument
tests.key: circumference › computes a custom-radius circumference

tests.description: computes 2 pi r for the default dial radius
tests.key: circumference › computes the default-radius circumference

tests.description: negative values clamp up to zero
tests.key: clampPct › clamps a negative value to zero

tests.description: values above one hundred clamp down to one hundred
tests.key: clampPct › clamps an over-max value to one hundred

tests.description: the range boundaries themselves are preserved
tests.key: clampPct › preserves the zero and hundred boundaries

tests.description: values inside the range pass through unchanged
tests.key: clampPct › returns an in-range value unchanged

tests.description: NaN degrades to zero rather than propagating
tests.key: clampPct › returns zero for NaN

tests.description: Values above 5 clamp to 5 and fractionals round.
tests.key: clampRating › clamps high values to 5 and rounds

tests.description: Valid 1-5 ratings (numeric or string) pass through.
tests.key: clampRating › passes valid 1-5 ratings through

tests.description: Missing, blank, or sub-1 values read as not rated (null).
tests.key: clampRating › treats missing / blank / sub-1 as not rated

tests.description: takes the UTC calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD) from an ISO datetime
tests.key: dayKey › takes the UTC calendar date from an ISO datetime

tests.description: an unknown filterKey still gets a chip (labeled by its key) so it is reachable
tests.key: deriveChips › appends chips for unexpected kinds so nothing is unreachable

tests.description: a duplicate kind across entries produces a single chip
tests.key: deriveChips › dedupes repeated kinds

tests.description: only kinds present in the data get chips, in canonical order
tests.key: deriveChips › derives chips from present kinds in CHIP_ORDER order

tests.description: always leads with an All chip even when there is no data
tests.key: deriveChips › returns just the All chip for empty data

tests.description: escaping runs before emphasis so injected tags cannot survive as live markup
tests.key: emphasize › does not emit raw tags from an escaped span

tests.description: escapes HTML-significant characters so seed content cannot inject markup
tests.key: emphasize › escapes angle brackets and ampersands

tests.description: the empty string maps to the empty string
tests.key: emphasize › handles the empty string

tests.description: leaves text with no asterisks unchanged
tests.key: emphasize › passes through plain text

tests.description: wraps a single asterisk-delimited span in an em element
tests.key: emphasize › wraps an asterisk span in em

tests.description: converts more than one emphasis span in a single string
tests.key: emphasize › wraps multiple spans

tests.description: the type chip and the query must both pass
tests.key: entryMatchesFilter › ANDs the type and query

tests.description: a type chip matches only entries with that filterKey
tests.key: entryMatchesFilter › filters by the entry filterKey

tests.description: the query matches title, summary, and accent case-insensitively
tests.key: entryMatchesFilter › matches the query across title, summary, and accent case-insensitively

tests.description: an empty or 'all' type matches every entry
tests.key: entryMatchesFilter › passes everything when type is empty or all

tests.description: Counts how many factors are 'strong' out of the total.
tests.key: factorTally › counts strong factors out of the total

tests.description: An empty factor set tallies to zero of zero.
tests.key: factorTally › handles an empty set

tests.description: Looks up a real catalog provider by id.
tests.key: findProvider › finds a known provider

tests.description: Every AI provider declares at least one connect method.
tests.key: findProvider › gives every AI provider at least one method

tests.description: Returns undefined for an unknown id.
tests.key: findProvider › returns undefined for an unknown id

tests.description: Fractional values keep one decimal place.
tests.key: formatProgress › keeps one decimal for fractional values

tests.description: The unit is omitted when not supplied.
tests.key: formatProgress › omits the unit when not given

tests.description: Whole numbers render without a decimal point.
tests.key: formatProgress › renders whole numbers without decimals

tests.description: Below the target the goal is active.
tests.key: goalStatus › is active before the target

tests.description: A bad (non-positive) target reads as active.
tests.key: goalStatus › is active for a bad target

tests.description: At or beyond the target the goal is complete.
tests.key: goalStatus › is complete at or beyond the target

tests.description: entries are grouped into newest-first days with relative labels
tests.key: groupByDay › groups entries into newest-first days with relative labels

tests.description: no entries yields no day groups
tests.key: groupByDay › returns empty for no entries

tests.description: An out-of-range or NaN hour falls back to morning.
tests.key: inferPartOfDay › falls back to morning for an out-of-range hour

tests.description: Before noon is morning; noon onward is evening.
tests.key: inferPartOfDay › is morning before noon, evening after

tests.description: Only 'strong' counts as positive (mint); steady and strained do not.
tests.key: isPositiveState › is true only for strong

tests.description: A very short key is fully masked.
tests.key: maskKey › fully masks a key of four or fewer characters

tests.description: A normal key keeps only its last four characters.
tests.key: maskKey › masks all but the last four characters

tests.description: Surrounding whitespace is trimmed before masking.
tests.key: maskKey › trims whitespace before masking

tests.description: An error-status row surfaces the connection but is NOT counted as connected.
tests.key: mergeCatalog › does not count an error row as connected

tests.description: A provider with no row is not connected and not active.
tests.key: mergeCatalog › leaves providers without a row disconnected

tests.description: A provider with a connected row reflects connected + active state.
tests.key: mergeCatalog › marks a provider with a connected row as connected and active

tests.description: Output order follows the catalog, not the rows.
tests.key: mergeCatalog › preserves catalog order

tests.description: Each known range narrows to itself.
tests.key: normalizeRange › accepts each known range

tests.description: Unknown / null / undefined all default to the weekly range.
tests.key: normalizeRange › defaults unknown / null / undefined to weekly

tests.description: malformed ids (no kind, unknown kind, non-positive/non-numeric id) return null
tests.key: parseEntryId › rejects malformed ids

tests.description: a well-formed id splits into kind and numeric db id
tests.key: parseEntryId › splits kind and numeric id

tests.description: Progress beyond the target clamps to 100%.
tests.key: progressPct › clamps over-shot progress to 100

tests.description: A normal current/target yields the expected percentage.
tests.key: progressPct › computes a normal fraction

tests.description: Zero current is 0% at the start.
tests.key: progressPct › is 0 at the start

tests.description: NaN or infinite inputs degrade to 0.
tests.key: progressPct › returns 0 for NaN / infinite inputs

tests.description: A non-positive target degrades to 0 rather than dividing by zero.
tests.key: progressPct › returns 0 for a non-positive target instead of dividing by zero

tests.key: rangeLabel › maps known range keys to titles

tests.description: An unrecognized range key is returned unchanged.
tests.key: rangeLabel › passes through an unknown key unchanged

tests.description: Each 1-5 value maps to a word; null renders as an em dash.
tests.key: ratingLabel › maps values to words

tests.description: negative scores clamp to the full circumference
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › clamps a negative score to full circumference

tests.description: scores above one hundred clamp to a zero offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › clamps an over-max score to zero offset

tests.description: the mockup score of eighty-two matches the reference offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › matches the reference offset near eighty-two

tests.description: NaN degrades to the empty-ring offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns full circumference for NaN

tests.description: a zero score leaves the whole ring undrawn
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns the full circumference at a zero score

tests.description: a full score leaves no gap, so the offset is zero
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns zero offset at a full score

tests.description: older days read as weekday + month + date
tests.key: relativeDayLabel › labels older days with weekday + month + date

tests.description: the newest day in the set reads as Today
tests.key: relativeDayLabel › labels the newest day Today

tests.description: the day before the newest reads as Yesterday
tests.key: relativeDayLabel › labels the prior day Yesterday

tests.description: an entry later on the newest day still reads Today, never a future label
tests.key: relativeDayLabel › never returns a negative-diff label for entries after the reference

tests.description: An over-shot goal reports 0 remaining, never negative.
tests.key: remaining › never goes negative on an over-shot goal

tests.description: Reports how much is left to reach the target.
tests.key: remaining › reports the gap to target

tests.key: ring geometry › offset is full circumference at 0% and 0 at 100%

tests.key: summary builders › joins present workout stats, skipping missing ones
